title: Stage-2 Direct normalized admission binding (spot.stage02.direct_admission_binding.v1)
description: The NORMALIZED binding a neutral adapter DERIVES from the immutable native W10 admission report plus the Direct bundle/release on disk. The native report stays the SOLE admission source and is not mutated; this binding is what Step0, temporal, P2S, pathway and W3's aggregate manifest all read through one seam. Every value was independently RE-DERIVED by the adapter from bytes on disk. A release subject additionally carries the cross-pins W3's aggregate binds: release_canonical_sha256, scorer_view_sha256, direct_bundle_ids, code_identity, and the native report path + raw sha.

source_report_sha256.description: The native report's report_sha256, RE-DERIVED by the adapter from the report body.

native_verdict.description: The native token, carried VERBATIM. Never case-folded.

disposition.description: The aggregate's disposition, mapped byte-exactly from the native token.

verifier_id.description: spot.stage02.direct.arm_bundle.verifier.v1 for a bundle; spot.stage02.direct.release.verifier.v1 for a release.

bundle_id.description: Non-null for a bundle subject; null for a release.

release_id.description: The direct_release_run_id. Non-null for a release subject; null for a bundle.

solver_lock_sha256.description: The environment/solver lock, re-confirmed against the hard pin. (W3's env_lock_sha256 aligns to THIS field name.)

scorer_view_sha256.description: The Stage-2 scorer view the arms were projected under; the same view for every bundle in a release.

stage1_scorer_view_canonical_sha256.description: Non-null for a release-lane bundle and for a release subject; null for a synthetic-lane bundle.

arm_rows_sha256.description: The bundle's arm-rows hash. Non-null for a bundle subject; null for a release, whose arm rows live in its per-bundle members.

mask_sha256.description: RE-DERIVED by the adapter from the bundle's masks.parquet, cross-checked against the bundle's own provenance. null when the bundle was not verified on disk, or for a release subject.

release_canonical_sha256.description: The Direct release document self-hash (direct_release_sha256). Non-null for a release subject; null for a bundle.

direct_bundle_ids.description: The admitted per-condition arm_bundle_run_id (exactly 3). Non-null for a release subject; null for a bundle.

code_identity.description: The ONE code identity (canonical_digest) all the release's bundles were built under, RE-DERIVED by the adapter from each bundle's provenance. Non-null for a release verified with its directory (--bundle=<release dir>).

w10_report.description: Path to the native W10 report this binding was derived from. Non-null for a release subject (the scheduler passes --report).

w10_report_raw_sha256.description: sha256 of the native W10 report file's raw bytes. Non-null for a release subject.

direct_bundle_sha256.description: Every shipped bundle file, RE-HASHED from disk by the adapter. Empty when the bundle was not verified on disk (or for a release subject).

binding_sha256.description: sha256 over this binding without this field. Self-hashed, so a normalized value cannot be edited after it is cited.
